name: D/D/D Cursed King Siegfried
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>血</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サイフリート
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner "D/D" monsters
During either player's turn: You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap Card on the field; that target has its effects negated, until the next Standby Phase. You can only use this effect of "D/D/D Cursed King Siegfried" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the Graveyard: Gain 1000 LP for each "Dark Contract" card you control.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect

summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires archetype specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
